name: gsdd-cli
description: GSDD — a portable, spec-driven development kernel for AI coding agents. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, Copilot, and Gemini CLI.

scripts.test:gsdd: node tests/gsdd.init.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.models.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.manifest.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.plan.adapters.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.audit-milestone.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.invariants.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.guards.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.health.test.cjs && node tests/gsdd.scenarios.test.cjs

author: PatrickSys
